reviews.comment:
Fila de 2 cuadras para cargar combustible. La estación es chica y se ve sobrepasada por el tráfico que va de paso. Irrazonable en una provincia petrolera

(Translated by Google)
Two-block-long line to get gas. The station is small and overwhelmed by through traffic. Unreasonable in an oil-producing province.

reviews.comment:
Es una de las 2 estaciones de servicio que tiene Chos Malal.
Tiene nafta super e infinia, gasoil comun e infinia.
Reciben tarjetas y efectivo. Si sos socio ACA hay 5% de descuento.
También tiene YPF Full y los playeros son atentos.

(Translated by Google)
It's one of the two gas stations in Chos Malal.
They have premium and high-octane gasoline, as well as regular and high-octane diesel.
They accept credit cards and cash. ACA members get a 5% discount.
They also carry YPF Full, and the attendants are friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXaEpDRllBEAE
